## Which process document do you want to update?
(new document)

## Summary of New Content
Create a comprehensive README that serves as the central index for all OctoAcme Project Management process documents. This README will provide:
- A brief overview of OctoAcme's project management approach and principles
- Direct links to all 8 process documentation files in the docs folder
- Quick reference guide for each process phase
- Navigation structure for new team members and stakeholders

## Why is this update needed?
A centralized README will significantly improve knowledge accessibility by:
- Providing a single entry point for all project management processes
- Helping new team members quickly discover and understand OctoAcme's methodology
- Creating a structured navigation index that reduces time spent searching for process documents
- Supporting the Copilot Spaces initiative to scale institutional knowledge across the organization

## Suggested Content
The README should include:

### Project Management Processes Summary
OctoAcme follows a comprehensive project management lifecycle with five main phases:
1. **Initiation** - Validate business need, identify stakeholders, confirm go/no-go decision
2. **Planning** - Define scope, resources, milestones, and dependencies
3. **Execution** - Build, test, review, and iterate with daily standups and quality gates
4. **Release** - Deploy to production with safety checks and rollback readiness
5. **Retrospective** - Capture learnings and drive continuous improvement

### Documentation Index
- [OctoAcme Project Management Overview](./octoacme-project-management-overview.md) - High-level introduction to processes and roles
- [Project Initiation Guide](./octoacme-project-initiation.md) - Steps to validate and authorize work
- [Project Planning](./octoacme-project-planning.md) - Break work into actionable increments
- [Execution & Tracking](./octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md) - Day-to-day execution and progress tracking
- [Risk Management & Communication](./octoacme-risks-and-communication.md) - Identify and manage risks
- [Release & Deployment Guide](./octoacme-release-and-deployment.md) - Standardized release procedures
- [Retrospective & Continuous Improvement](./octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md) - Capture learnings and improvements
- [OctoAcme Personas](./octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) - Role definitions and responsibilities

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [x] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
